faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Tremont typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the extent of infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections to provide accurate quotes and can customize solutions for Tremont's older multi-family buildings and single-family homes.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Tremont homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windowsills, mud tubes along foundation walls, and visible wood damage. In Tremont's older buildings, termites often attack structural beams, floor joists, and wooden window frames. If you notice any of these signs, schedule an inspection immediately to prevent costly damage.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Tremont are completed in 1-2 days, though extensive infestations may require additional time. Treatment methods include liquid barriers, bait systems, and localized wood treatments. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your household while ensuring complete termite elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite warranties in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide warranty options on our termite treatments throughout Tremont and the Bronx. Our warranties include regular inspections and retreatment if termites return within the coverage period. We'll explain all warranty terms during your free consultation and customize protection plans for your specific property needs.
